title: Essential PVP Utilities
description: This mod contains many features to give you an advantage when fighting. Contains Fast Block Placements, Wind Charge Optimizer, [Beta] Crystal Optimizer, Faster Strafing and much more.
body:
This mod adds many useful features to give you an advantage in PvP, such as enderpearl trajectories [allows you to see where throwables would land before yoy throw then, with the option to only make throwed itens trajectories], fast block placement [allows you to place blocks faster then the default 4 tick vanilla delay], crystal optimizer, outlines that appear when you can hit an enemy, custom FOV amounts [allows you to set fov aboce the default vanilla limit], and much more, all toggleable by commands (_/c{Feature}_). 
**Note: This may not be allowed on certain servers.**
